DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN B. MCCALLISTER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Richard Phillips Koch, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Truman Phan-Quang, Esq. appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is overruled. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR # 9225

Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN B. MCCALLISTER Motion to Strike Portions of the Complaint. Appearances: Richard Phillips Koch, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Truman Phan-Quang, Esq. appearing for Defendant and Moving party. (The tentative ruling on the Motion to strike is not being contested.) The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike granted, ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts regarding the malicious conduct. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR # 9225
